register_system: Você/tu (BR warmer); formal varies. Trap: variant mixing.
translationese_traps: Pronoun position (enclitic/proclitic); vocab mix; literal idioms.
return_to_original_risks: Variant inconsistency; pronoun/accent shift; idiom loss.
idiom_mapping_notes: Functional; adapt regional (some ENG-shared); cultural substitution.
tutoring_pronunciation_hooks: BR open vowels/nasals; EU reduced/guttural; tilde nasal.
professional_resources: Academia das Ciências (PT); ABL (BR); ATA; Priberam/Casa da Língua.
